The Athletic Court Problem

Poor construction leads to uneven play, premature wear, and costly repairs. Don't settle for subpar courts.

Uneven Playing Surfaces

Poor drainage and improper grading create puddles, dead spots, and inconsistent ball bounce that frustrates players and reduces court lifespan.

Premature Cracking & Wear

Inferior materials and rushed installation lead to surface cracks, fading, and structural issues that require expensive repairs within just a few years.

Costly Contractor Mistakes

Inexperienced contractors cut corners on foundation work, drainage systems, and surface preparation, leaving you with expensive problems to fix later.

Championship-Level Construction

Every CourTex court is built with precision engineering and premium materials for optimal performance and longevity.

Pickleball Specialty

Capitalize on pickleball's explosive growth with courts built for the future. Specialized construction with ideal cushioning, superior grip, and perfect dimensions.

Post-Tension Concrete

Durable foundation system that prevents cracking and settling. Our post-tension concrete creates long-lasting, high-performance courts for decades of play.

Premium Surface Systems

PickleGrip, Cushion-X, and Pro-Cushion surfaces engineered for optimal ball response, player comfort, and weather resistance.

Expert Resurfacing

Restore tennis, pickleball, and multi-use courts with expert resurfacing services. 15+ years of experience in both technical and artistic aspects.

Multi-Sport Capability

Tennis courts that handle championship games, basketball courts with precise measurements, and versatile multi-use surfaces for athletic facilities.

Regional Expertise

Serving Texas, Colorado, and the Carolinas with deep knowledge of local climate conditions, soil types, and regulatory requirements.

Getting Started

From initial consultation to championship-ready courts in three simple steps.

1

Request a Quote

Fill out a quick form with your details, and our team will arrange a property survey to explore the best location options for your court.

2

Design & Build

Work with our experts to customize your court's layout, materials, and features to fit your vision and budget. Then, we bring it to life with professional installation.

3

Enjoy Your Court

It's time to play! Gather family and friends, stay active, and make lasting memories on your brand-new championship-quality court.

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does it take to build a pickleball court?

Most pickleball court projects take 2-4 weeks from start to finish, depending on site preparation requirements and weather conditions. We'll provide a detailed timeline during your consultation.

What is the difference between resurfacing and new construction?

Resurfacing involves applying new surface materials to an existing court foundation, while new construction includes excavation, foundation work, and complete court installation. We assess your specific situation to recommend the best approach.

Do you provide court maintenance services?

Yes, we offer ongoing maintenance services including cleaning, crack repair, and periodic resurfacing to keep your court in optimal playing condition for years to come.

What court surfaces do you offer?

We offer multiple surface options including cushioned acrylic systems, hard courts, and specialized surfaces like PickleGrip and Cushion-X for enhanced performance and player comfort.

Can you convert existing tennis courts to pickleball?

Absolutely! We specialize in tennis court conversions to pickleball, including proper line marking and surface modifications for optimal play. This is often more cost-effective than new construction.

What areas do you serve?

CourTex Construction serves Texas, Colorado, and the Carolinas with full construction and resurfacing services for residential and commercial clients.
